description: It's all about dressing sporty, and what better way to do it with ease than with this bag from adidas.Height: 44cmWidth: 19cmDepth: 32cmMade of 100% polyester with a nylon lining One main zippered compartment with a separator and a padded laptop sleeveOrganizer pouches and a mobile pouchOne zippered compartment on the frontOne mesh pocket on the side Padded and adjustable shoulder straps with adidas logoSynthetic haul loop for handling easeBranded zippersErgonomic design with a padded backCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
